description:
> - **__You are all required to write in correct English__. This server is not a playground. If you write in an illegible manner, you will be warned or banned.**
> - **The Staff reserves the right to report any behavior deemed inappropriate to Discord.**
> - **Staff members have the power to enforce the rules and always have the final say.**
> - **Additional sanctions, not listed here, may be applied if necessary**

title: <a:livre:1269193974762176625>  ・**Article One - Responsibility**
description:
> **(1)** <a:identite:1269193853882335243> ▻ Each individual in this community, whether hidden behind a pseudonym or a screen, is fully responsible for their actions and words. You are the sole guarantor of your account and must bear the consequences.
> 
> **(2)** <a:warning:1269193959503040553>  ▻ Everything that happens on the server, whether it's words, messages, or other actions, concerns us all. You must report any suspicious behavior via a TICKET.
> 
> **(3)**  ✔️  ▻ You must remain respectful under all circumstances. In case of dispute, the Staff always has the final say. Any harm to another's life will be severely punished, and the Staff is committed to protecting victims to the end.

title: <a:livre:1269193974762176625> ・**Article Two - Communication**
description:
> **(1)**  <a:message:1269193944626102343>  ▻ **English is the only language allowed on this server. __You must all write in correct English__. This server is not a place for disorderly discussions. If your writing is too illegible, you will be warned or banned.** Anglicisms are tolerated as long as they are understood by everyone. Avoid casual language, even for jokes. Insults and vulgar language are strictly prohibited.
> 
> **(2)**  <a:important:1269193930084454462> ▻ Any form of self-promotion (message, DM, profile, voice...) is strictly prohibited. Sanctions can range from warning to permanent ban.
> 
> **(3)** <:link:1269200427333849211> ▻ Everything you share on this server (messages, multimedia content, images, videos, files...) will be checked by the Staff. Inappropriate and NSFW content (gore, violence, pornography...) is prohibited and may result in a permanent ban.
> 
> **(4)** <a:pouce:1269193912871030827>  ▻ Each channel has specific rules. For example, you can only farm the economy in the channel dedicated to the economy, execute commands only in the channel intended for commands, etc. The general chat is for discussion; do not ask specific questions or ask for help without context in this channel. Use the FORUMS for this.
> 
> **(5)**  <a:vocal:1269193877571764265> ▻ It is forbidden to shout without reason in voice spaces or to modify your voice.
> 
> (6) <a:interdit:1269193896790065152> **No Advertising**: Advertising in all its forms is strictly prohibited. No promotional links or sponsored content is allowed.

title: <a:livre:1269193974762176625> ・**Article Three - Security**
description:
> **(1)** <a:identite:1269193853882335243>  ▻ Your username and profile must be appropriate and distinct (avoid special characters so that the Staff can mention you; do not copy the usernames of other members or Staff). The staff reserves the right to modify your username if necessary.
> 
> **(2)** <a:form:1269193840154378240>  ▻ It is forbidden to lie about your identity (age, gender, etc.). Any form of malice towards others, including suspicious or predatory intentions and threats, will result in an immediate ban.
> 
> **(3)** <a:lettre:1269193830524125277>  ▻ Any form of spam, mass mentions, raids, flooding, or any incitement or participation in these activities, even for humorous purposes, is punishable by a permanent ban.
> 
> **(4)** <a:ticket:1269193818302054430>   ▻ Use the ticket system appropriately. It allows you to report any suspicious behavior to the Staff. Provide as much evidence as possible (screenshots, etc.) when opening a ticket so that the Staff can handle the situation effectively.
<:verified:1269208136393424936> We consider that if you have joined the server, you have acknowledged the rules.
